case_title: VINSON, THADIUS VS LE, HUNG MY OWNER DBA SILVER CAR CARE

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO DEC-16-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-01-2004 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VINSON, THADIUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LE, HUNG MY OWNER DBA SILVER CAR CARE $2,665.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,687.00, CONCURRENT WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT THE FOLLOWING: ANY "LOANER" CAR PROVIDED TO PLAINTIFF BY DEFENDANT, IF ANY, CURRENTLY IN PLAINTIFF'S POSSESSION. DEFENDANT TO ALSO RETURN PLAINTIFF'S CAR IF IT REMAINS IN DEFENDANT'S POSSESSION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
